name: io.argoproj.workflow.v1alpha1.Parameter
description: Parameter indicate a passed string parameter to a service template with an optional default value

default.description: Default is the default value to use for an input parameter if a value was not supplied

enum.description: Enum holds a list of string values to choose from, for the actual value of the parameter

globalName.description: GlobalName exports an output parameter to the global scope, making it available as '{{io.argoproj.workflow.v1alpha1.outputs.parameters.XXXX}} and in workflow.status.outputs.parameters

value.description: Value is the literal value to use for the parameter. If specified in the context of an input parameter, any passed values take precedence over the specified value

valueFrom.description: ValueFrom is the source for the output parameter's value
